systemUpdate.title: System Update
systemUpdate.confirmContent1: The program will update to v{{version}}.
systemUpdate.confirmContent2: The program will restart automatically during the update.
systemUpdate.confirmContent3: Do not close the program window.
systemUpdate.updateSuccessRefresh: Update complete. The page will refresh soon.
systemUpdate.usage1: Updates keep local accounts, group settings, data, and logs.
systemUpdate.usage2: Do not move or delete the program folder during an update.
systemUpdate.usage3: If the page does not reopen after updating, run the launcher again.
systemUpdate.usage4: Updates are downloaded only from the built-in GitHub Release source.
